ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "park_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the park (e.g., ALB01) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the stadium started operation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the stadium ended operation (NULL if still in use) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the stadium is associated with */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the stadium */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the stadium */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the stadium location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the stadium location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "dissolved_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was dissolved (NULL if still active) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alternative_names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternative name */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium */,
  "alternative_name" TEXT /* Alternative name for the stadium */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the alternative name started being used */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the alternative name stopped being used (NULL if still in use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternative_names_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, curator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stadium data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stadium data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadium_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadium_history_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadium_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadium_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadium_images_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium the team played in */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belonged to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the team started playing */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the team stopped playing (NULL if still active) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)
